stimulus: In 2018, paleontologist Mariella Ortega was surveying a remote ridge in northern Patagonia when she spotted what appeared to be a row of three-toed impressions pressed into the exposed ______blank the aid of photogrammetric mapping, she confirmed the prints belonged to a previously unknown species of theropod dinosaur.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The convention being tested is punctuation use between sentences. The period correctly marks the boundary between the first sentence (“In...sandstone”) and the second sentence (“With...dinosaur”), which begins with a supplementary phrase.

Choice B is incorrect because it results in a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because, without a comma preceding it, the conjunction “so” can’t join two main clauses. Choice D is incorrect because it results in a run-on sentence.
